document.heading: First Amendment to the Kiowa Casino Operations Authority Charter Act of 2023.
document.text: At a duly called Session of the Legislature of the Kiowa Tribe held this 12 day of July, 2025, the following Resolution and Law were adopted.

recital.text: the Legislature is vested with the authority to pass laws and resolutions pursuant to Article VI, Section 6(a) of the Constitution of the Kiowa Tribe; and,
the Legislature has enacted and approved an amended Charter to establish and govern the Kiowa Casino Operations Authority ("KCOA") to operate and manage the Tribe's profitable gaming businesses; and,

the Legislature has determined that it is in the best interests of the Tribe to set high standards and conduct for the KCOA Board of Trustees, in order to operating its casinos with the highest degree of financial and business integrity and professionalism.

recital.conjunction: NOW THEREFORE IT BE IT RESOLVED;
recital.text: that the Legislature hereby approves and enacts "First Amendment to the Kiowa Casino Operations Authority Charter Act of 2023".

text.b: C E R T I F I C A T I O N

procedural-data.text: The foregoing Resolution KL-CY-2025-008 was duly voted upon by the Legislature on July 12, 2025, at a Legislative Regular Session XCIX-(99) with a vote of (7) in favor and (0) opposed, (0) abstaining, and (0) absent, pursuant to the authority vested in the Legislature by the Constitution of the Kiowa Tribe.

text.b: DELIVERY OF THE RESOLUTION AND LAW TO THE CHAIRMAN

procedural-data.text: Resolution No. KL-CY-2025-008 was presented to the Chairman of the Kiowa Tribe on the 15th day of July, 2025, pursuant to the Article VI, Section 8(a)(iv) of the Constitution of the Kiowa Tribe, and will become effective after signature by the Chairman or veto override by the Legislature, and as otherwise required by the Constitution.
[ ] VETO - RETURNED TO LEGISLATURE WITH EXPLANATION:
Presented by the Chairman to the Legislature on the ____ day of _________, 2025.

text.b: C E R T I F I C A T I O N

procedural-data.text: The foregoing Legislative Order, KL-CY-2025-0XX was duly voted upon by the Legislature on __________________, 2025, at a Legislative Override Order Session with a vote of () yes, () no, () abstaining, () absent. Pursuant to the authority vested in the Legislature by the Constitution of the Kiowa Tribe.

section.heading: Short Title
section.text: This enactment shall be known as "First Amendment to the Kiowa Casino Operations Authority Charter Act of 2023".

section.heading: Purpose
section.text: The purpose of this Act is to establish stronger standards and conduct for the Board of Trustees ("Trustees") of the Kiowa Casino Operations Authority ("KCOA").

para.text: The Legislature has enacted and approved an amended Charter to establish and govern the Kiowa Casino Operating Authority, to operate and manage the Tribe's profitable gaming businesses.
